name: ClawKB Multi-Instance Auto-Recall
description: Automatically searches one or more ClawKB instances and injects relevant knowledge into agent context. Supports per-sender token mapping for fine-grained access control.

instances.description: List of ClawKB server instances to query

id.description: Unique identifier for this instance (used in result labels)

label.description: Human-readable label for this instance (shown in injected results)

defaultToken.description: API token to use when the sender is not in senderTokenMap. Set for public KBs. Null to require explicit mapping.

senderTokenMap.description: Map of sender ID → API token. Each sender gets their own token with server-side ACL.

enabled.description: Master switch to enable/disable the plugin

trigger.description: When to trigger a search: always (every message), question (interrogative messages), keyword (only when keywords match)

keywords.description: Keywords that trigger search. Only used when trigger=keyword.

topK.description: Maximum number of results to fetch per instance

threshold.description: Minimum similarity score (0–1) to include a result. ClawKB returns scores 0–100; this is normalized automatically.

inject.description: How much to inject: summary (title+summary), content (title+summary+content), full (everything including tags and similarity score)

maxTokens.description: Approximate maximum tokens to inject (enforced by character count ≈ tokens × 4)
